Name: SVP Collisions, Physics, and Hit Stops
Author: JosephsDeadish
Description: SVP Collisions, Physics, and Hit Stops — plug-and-play physics mod: body jiggle with directional boost, HDT hair (wind/rain/snow/micro-oscillation), idle motion, ragdoll, hitstop visual flash, per-archetype monster physics, farm animal physics, NPC/pet sword knockdown, environmental grass+item collision, crop/weed terrain collision for all creatures. Works with LewdEW, Valley Girls, XTardew, HornyFur, Fashion Sense, Creatures and Cuties, and all custom sprite/hair/creature mods.
